← Portfolio
Meeting Agenda Acme Corp

Attendees

  • Sarah M. — VP Engineering, Acme Corp
  • Tyler M. — Technical Success, Maze Security

Agenda

1. Q1 Recap (10 min)

  • Review scan coverage growth: 72% → 94%
  • Celebrate: zero critical findings missed in Q1
  • Address 2 open tickets from last session

2. Platform Walkthrough (15 min)

  • New: automated AWS sub-account discovery
  • New: Slack alert routing (ready to configure)
  • Demo: investigation workflow improvements

3. Q2 Goals (15 min)

  • Target: 100% scan coverage across all accounts
  • Expand to EU region (8 new accounts)
  • Enable automated remediation for P3/P4 findings

4. Roadmap Preview (10 min)

  • CSPM enhancements — GA in May
  • API security scanning — beta in June
  • Compliance reporting (SOC 2, ISO 27001) — Q3

5. Open Q&A (10 min)

Action Items from Last Meeting

  • Sarah — Share list of EU AWS account IDs (due Apr 20)
  • Tyler — Send Slack integration setup guide (done)
  • Tyler — Schedule Q2 executive review (done — May 14)
